measurements.claim: Pass 0021 created a QuantumFrameworkEnvironmentPlanSet/v1 artifact with status ENVIRONMENT_PLAN_AND_OTEL_BRIDGE_MATCH, 11 package plans, nine negative fixtures, 15 source anchors, OTel status API_IMPORT_MATCH_NONRECORDING, and seal 1ce3a1aaab7392d4a825564415a76e71a4f8b59c2a954dbb794d4ffe7e67cb1f.
